description: CodeBuddy platform support, OpenCode plugin fix, improved skill descriptions
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(platform): add CodeBuddy (Tencent) platform support with nested slash commands (.codebuddy/commands/trellis/)
- feat(skills): improve skill descriptions across Codex, Kiro, and Qoder for better AI triggering accuracy

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(opencode): correct plugin directory name from plugin/ to plugins/ in configurator
notes: Run `trellis update` to sync. No migration required.
